top_signals.title: Treasury yields resume climb as traders monitor inflation risks
top_signals.summary: Borrowing costs edged higher Thursday as investors eye ongoing inflationary pressures in the U.S. economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Texas, Florida top list of states reporting millions of dollars lost through crypto ATMs
top_signals.summary: In most complaints, victims said they were given detailed information by fraudsters on how to take money from their bank account, where to find a cryptocurrency kiosk and how to send the funds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Indonesia's new export control rattles commodity buyers: 5 things to know
Coal remains competitive for power generation in the central United States
top_signals.summary: In the first four months of 2026, electricity, natural gas, and coal prices suggested continued favorable economics for coal generation in MISO. The dark spread of coal, the difference between the fuel costs for coal-fired generation and the wholesale electricity price, in the Midcontinent Independent System Operator (MISO) region outpaced a similar measure of revenue relative to fuel costs for natural gas-fired generators known as the spark spread.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
